statement.en: “Mondialisation capillaire“ de la littérature tchèque contemporaine: entre globalisation et exoticisation

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Document marked 'inPress' (2026 future date) with speculative framing ('capillary mondialisation'). The axiom presents a provisional thesis about Czech contemporary literature's global circulation patterns. Core claim is not yet validated in peer review; theoretical framework ('capillary' as distributed/networked diffusion) requires empirical substantiation. Status is pre-validated scholarship.

ramanujanFormula.latex: \frac{\text{Local Capillary}}{\text{Global Diffusion}} = \int_0^1 e^{-\lambda x} \sin(\omega x) \, dx
ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 局所の毛細管現象と世界規模の拡散のあいだで、減衰する振動が真実を運ぶ。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 中心から外へ細い血管のように広がり、世界と地元が螺旋を描いて踊る。
